GalleryItem.title: Gallery Item
GalleryItem.description: An image item for the marble work gallery.

url.description: The public URL of the image.

alt.description: SEO-friendly alt text for the image.

category.description: The category of the marble work (e.g., Graves, Headstones).

path.description: The path to the file in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the item was added.

ContactMessage.title: Contact Message
ContactMessage.description: A message submitted via the contact form.

email.description: The email address of the sender.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

read.description: Whether the message has been read by an admin.
